name: Interactive LLM Agent
description: This node enables standalone or dataframe-optional LLM queries across multiple providers (OpenAI, Bedrock, Gemini). It is designed for sequential agent flows like 'Similar Company Finder' and supports saving structured responses.
input: Optional DataFrame (if metadata columns are selected)

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured LLM connection that defines the provider, authentication credentials, and model settings used by the interactive agent.

fields.name: customPrompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Custom instruction or task definition provided to the LLM agent. Used to guide agent behavior, reasoning flow, and response structure.

fields.name: metadataCols
fields.title: Metadata Columns
fields.description: Optional columns from the input DataFrame to pass as contextual metadata to the agent for grounding, enrichment, or response attribution.
